purpose_context: Phase 1 (charter-doctrine-mission-type-configuration) delivered mission-type activation but left the reader gap open, other doctrine artifact kinds unactivatable, two WPs producing dead code, and six architectural tests broken. This mission wires the full activation layer: the charter module becomes the authoritative filtered view over doctrine, a default charter pack ships with spec-kitty to preserve backward compatibility for all existing users, and the upgrade pipeline gains safe charter migration behavior with backup and user guidance.
purpose_tldr: Complete the charter activation model across all doctrine artifact kinds with hard restriction, explicit cascade control, and a shipped default charter pack.
